raw_consumer_statement: In 2024 I contacted American Express about a charge that was on my card but did not have the correct billing typed out so I repeatedly asked to have the bill fixed they never did and I ask American Express to dispute this charge due to the unknown person on the bill it was not my name and at the time I have contacted this person for months to see whats up with the bill and nothing you guys never helped me whats so ever felt like you were more for the other side I was disputing about and I have lost over $ XXXX after wards
